data.name: Validation.Failed
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: Auth.RefreshTokenInvalid
data.value: Refresh token is invalid or expired.

data.name: Auth.RefreshOwnerMissing
data.value: The user owning this refresh token no longer exists.

data.name: Auth.RegistrationFailed
data.value: Could not create user. The email may already be registered or the password is not strong enough.

data.name: Auth.RoleAssignmentFailed
data.value: Could not assign the requested role to the user.

data.name: Property.ApartmentType.Invalid
data.value: Invalid apartment type '{0}'. Expected format: N+M (e.g. '2+1').

data.name: Property.ApartmentNumber.OutOfRange
data.value: Apartment number {0} is outside the allowed range ({1}..{2}).

data.name: Property.Floor.OutOfRange
data.value: Floor {0} is outside the allowed range ({1}..{2}).

data.name: Property.BlockName.Invalid
data.value: Block name must be non-empty and at most {0} characters.

data.name: Property.SiteName.Invalid
data.value: Site name must be non-empty and at most {0} characters.

data.name: Property.Block.DuplicateApartmentNumber
data.value: Apartment number {0} already exists in this block.

data.name: Property.Block.ApartmentNotFound
data.value: Apartment ({0}) was not found in this block.

data.name: Property.Site.DuplicateBlockName
data.value: A block named '{0}' already exists in this site.

data.name: Property.Site.BlockNotFound
data.value: Block ({0}) was not found in this site.
